description: This file defines API endpoints for managing tags in a web application, including listing and deleting tags for the authenticated user.

methods.name: list[schemas.TagResponse] list_tags( user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], prefix: Annotated[Optional[str], Query(description="Optional name prefix filter.")] = None, )
methods.description: Handles HTTP GET requests to list tags for the current user, optionally filtered by a name prefix.

methods.name: schemas.APIMessage delete_tag( tag_id: UUID, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )
methods.description: Handles HTTP DELETE requests to delete a specific tag by its ID for the authenticated user.

calls: res = await db.execute(select(Tag).where(and_(Tag.id == tag_id, Tag.owner_id == user.id)))

ctags.name: delete_tag
ctags.signature: ( tag_id: UUID, user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], )

ctags.name: list_tags
ctags.signature: ( user: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)], db: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)], prefix: Annotated[Optional[str], Query(description="Optional name prefix filter.")] = None, )
